ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Transit line the station belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the transit authority managing the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the station */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the station */,
  "wheelchair_accessible" INTEGER /* Indicates if the station is wheelchair accessible */,
  "elevator" INTEGER /* Indicates if the station has an elevator */,
  "escalator" INTEGER /* Indicates if the station has an escalator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transit_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transit line */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the transit line */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of transit (e.g., subway, bus) */,
  "route_map" TEXT /* Map or diagram of the route */,
  "number_of_stations" INTEGER /* Total number of stations on the line */,
  "average_headway" TEXT /* Average time between trains or buses on the line */,
  "peak_headway" TEXT /* Headway during peak hours */,
  "off_peak_headway" TEXT /* Headway during off-peak hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entries_exits" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry/exit record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the record */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the record */,
  "entries" INTEGER /* Total number of entries */,
  "exits" INTEGER /* Total number of exits */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the record combined */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific fare collection device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., turnstile, gate) */,
  "entry_exit_type" TEXT /* Type of entry/exit (e.g., regular, transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entries_exits_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entries_exits_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ridership_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of report generation */,
  "total_entries" INTEGER /* Total entries of the day */,
  "total_exits" INTEGER /* Total exits of the day */,
  "total_transfers" INTEGER /* Total transfers at the station */,
  "peak_hour_entries" INTEGER /* Number of entries during the peak hour */,
  "peak_hour_exits" INTEGER /* Number of exits during the peak hour */,
  "average_wait_time" TEXT /* Average wait time for passengers at the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ridership_reports_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, planner, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated date of the data */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., API, manual entry) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which data is updated from the source */,
  "reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operational_hours" (
  "hours_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for operational hours */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week */,
  "opening_time" TEXT /* Opening time of the station */,
  "closing_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the station */,
  "is_24_hours" INTEGER /* Indicates if the station operates 24 hours a day */,
  "special_hours" TEXT /* Special hours for holidays or special events */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hours_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station undergoing maintenance */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the maintenance activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the maintenance activity */,
  "crew_size" INTEGER /* Number of maintenance crew members involved */,
  "estimated_cost" TEXT /* Estimated cost of the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station related to the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of the feedback submission */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments given by the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., praise, complaint, suggestion) */,
  "attachment" TEXT /* Any attachments (e.g., photos, documents) related to the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the affected station */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date of the alert */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the alert has been resolved */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the alert */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., service delay, station closure) */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the alert (e.g., minor, major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)
